channel.title: Awesome Search KG
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Awesome Search KG

item.title: Doug Turnbull
item.description: Doug Turnbull Co-founder of OpenSource Connections (OSC); co-author of Relevant Search (O’Reilly).

item.title: Vinted - Migrating Search from Elasticsearch to Vespa
item.description: Vinted — Migrating Search from Elasticsearch to Vespa Field report from “Search Scaling Chapter 8: Goodbye Elasticsearch, Hello Vespa Search Engine” (Ernestas Poškus, Vinted Engineering, 2024-09-05).

item.title: MUVERA
item.description: MUVERA Definition MUVERA (Multi-Vector Retrieval via Fixed Dimensional Encodings) collapses a Late Interaction multi-vector representation (e.g.

item.title: Dense Retrieval at Vinted
item.description: Dense Retrieval at Vinted Laurynas Jasiukėnas & Dainius Jocas, Vinted Engineering, 2025-11-18.

item.title: Optimizing Vespa Latency with Match-Features at Vinted
item.description: Optimizing Vespa Latency with Match-Features at Vinted Dainius Jocas, Vinted Engineering, 2025-11-06.

item.title: Aleksas Kateiva
item.description: Aleksas Kateiva Engineer at Vinted; co-author of the Vinted Engineering post on adopting Vespa for recommendation retrieval (two-tower ANN with metadata prefiltering).

item.title: Dainius Jocas
item.description: Dainius Jocas Search engineer at Vinted; a recurring author of the Vinted Engineering posts on Vespa — covering recommendation retrieval and low-latency ranking with match-features.

item.title: Ernestas Poškus
item.description: Ernestas Poškus Search-platform engineer at Vinted.

item.title: Laurynas Jasiukėnas
item.description: Laurynas Jasiukėnas Engineer at Vinted; co-author of the Vinted Engineering post on dense retrieval — a multilingual-CLIP two-tower model serving hybrid semantic search on Vespa.

item.title: ONNX
item.description: ONNX ONNX (Open Neural Network Exchange) is an open, framework-agnostic format for representing machine-learning models, with ONNX Runtime as the high-performance inference engine.
